panels.description: Medium shot: Machua Appa stands before a crowd, gesturing proudly toward young Toomai, who looks modest but resolute. Jungle clearing at twilight, warm golden light on Toomai's face.

bubbles.text: This little one shall be Toomai of the Elephants! He shall be greater than I.

panels.description: Low angle medium shot: Toomai standing confidently in front of a massive, chained bull elephant. The elephant looks down at the boy with intelligent, recognizing eyes.

bubbles.text: Aihai! My lords in the chains. Here is the one who saw your hidden dances!

panels.description: Medium close-up: Toomai raises his hand in a command gesture. High intensity mood, sharp shadows, forest canopy light filtering down.

bubbles.text: Salaam karo! Give him honor! Barrao!

panels.description: Wide action shot: The entire line of elephants in the keddah raising their trunks in a synchronized, majestic salute to Toomai. Dramatic dust particles in the air, cinematic scale.

bubbles.text: A crashing trumpet-peal that only the Viceroy hears—The Salaamut of the Keddah.

panels.description: Mythological sequence: Parbati and Shiva sitting on a cosmic cloud, Parbati revealing a tiny grasshopper. Ethereal, soft lighting, stylistic shift to ancient folklore depiction.

bubbles.text: All have had their part, even the little one hidden 'neath thy heart.
